interface.longDescription:
Zen Shopping is ChatGPT’s smart shopping companion — compare prices across all stores, uncover the best deals, and get tailored recommendations fast. Shop confidently with AI that finds the right option, every time.

How to Use Zen Shopping in ChatGPT

1. Connect: Connect the Zen Shopping app to ChatGPT.
2. Trigger: Type Commands: Simply type “@” then choose the Zen Shopping app, or type “Zen Shopping” (followed by a space) in the chat box.
3. Create: You are ready to go! Try asking specifically:
· “Find product and recommend the best earbuds to buy.”
· “Gift ideas for Mom under $50.”
· “Compare 4 K monitors and show me where to purchase.”

Just connect the Zen Shopping app, and start shopping smarter—discover, compare, decide, then check out securely on the retailer’s page.
